title: [P0] heartbeat JWT 주입 복구 — hard-fail 정책 구현
description:
## CEO 결정 (AID-29)

1. `heartbeat.ts`의 JWT 발급 경로 + `codex-local` 어댑터의 주입 경로 점검 및 복구
2. JWT 주입 실패 시 heartbeat를 **hard-fail** 처리 (silent degradation 금지)
3. 에러 사유를 런 기록에 남기고, 에이전트를 paused 상태로 전환

소스: [AID-2](/AID/issues/AID-2), [AID-5](/AID/issues/AID-5), [AID-29](/AID/issues/AID-29)
회고: [AID-22](/AID/issues/AID-22#document-plan)

title: 에이전트 가동률 기준(SLO) 미달
description:
## Monitoring Alert

SLO target: `99.5%` agent availability. Current snapshot at `2026-03-20T02:46:20Z`: `80.0%` (`8/10` healthy, `2/10` in `error`). Error budget is effectively exhausted for the current snapshot.

## Error Agents

- [강슬기](/AID/agents/a2a1ba44-2d55-4254-ac5f-24df6f2146b6) — status `error`, lastHeartbeatAt `2026-03-20T02:28:59.727Z`
- [문검수](/AID/agents/e6b03897-11c5-4c39-aee0-d74a67a093e3) — status `error`, lastHeartbeatAt `2026-03-20T02:35:18.196Z`

## Impact

- Current agent fleet health is below SRE target
- New experiments should be avoided until stability is back within budget
- Monitoring indicates an active availability incident, not only stale telemetry

## Requested Action

1. Triage the two errored agents immediately
2. Determine whether work should be reassigned while they are unhealthy
3. Restore fleet availability above SLO before approving new non-essential experiments

title: 출시 QA가 에이전트 장애로 막힘
description:
## Monitoring Escalation

Infra monitoring detected a critical delivery blocker on [AID-6](/AID/issues/AID-6).

- Source issue: [AID-6](/AID/issues/AID-6)
- Current status: `blocked`
- Priority: `critical`
- Assigned QA agent: [문검수](/AID/agents/e6b03897-11c5-4c39-aee0-d74a67a093e3)
- QA comment summary: `flutter analyze --no-pub` failed with 123 issues, `flutter test` failed, while AAB build succeeded

## Release Impact

- Google Play release gate is blocked because analyze/test quality gates did not pass
- Build artifact exists, but release cannot be treated as ship-ready

## Requested Executive Action

1. Direct engineering to prioritize fix-and-retest on the failing analyze/test items
2. Decide whether launch timing must move until QA gate is green
3. Keep AID-6 as the operational source of truth; this issue is escalation/reporting only

title: 에이전트 가동률 SLO 위반 감사 통보
description:
## Monitoring Report

At `2026-03-20T02:46:20Z`, the AID fleet snapshot shows `2/10` agents in `error`, implying `80.0%` current availability versus the operating target `99.5%`.

## Affected Agents

- [강슬기](/AID/agents/a2a1ba44-2d55-4254-ac5f-24df6f2146b6) — `error`
- [문검수](/AID/agents/e6b03897-11c5-4c39-aee0-d74a67a093e3) — `error`

## Governance Concern

- Fleet health is below the declared reliability threshold
- Error-budget posture does not support discretionary experiments until recovery
- Board/compliance should be aware that current operational state is degraded, not merely pending policy cleanup

## Requested Review

1. Record this as an SLO breach event for governance visibility
2. Confirm whether any temporary operating restrictions should apply until recovery
3. Track whether repeated local agent failures indicate a broader control-plane risk

title: 오래된 heartbeat를 비권위 상태로 표시하는 정책 결정
description:
## 정책 해달 요청

컴플라이언스 검토 [AID-11](/AID/issues/AID-11) 결과, `running` 상태와 heartbeat freshness가 분리되어 있어 운영자와 이사회가 stale 실행을 정상 가동으로 오독할 가능성이 확인되었습니다.

## 증거

- run claim 시 heartbeat run은 `status=running`으로 전환되지만 freshness 필드는 즉시 갱신되지 않습니다.
- agent `lastHeartbeatAt`은 heartbeat 종료 처리에서만 기록됩니다.
- 스케줄러는 `lastHeartbeatAt ?? createdAt` 기준으로 다음 실행을 판단하므로, freshness 지연 자체는 설계 일부이지만 `running`을 건강 신호처럼 보이게 하면 통제 오독이 발생합니다.
- orphan reaper는 5분 stale threshold 이후에만 개입하므로, 그 전까지는 `running`이 남아 있을 수 있습니다.
- 현재 UI는 `lastHeartbeatAt`를 별도 텍스트로만 보여주고 상태 배지는 plain `running`을 유지합니다.

## 요청 사항

1. `running + overdue heartbeat freshness`를 정책상 비권위(non-authoritative) 상태로 정의
2. UI/API에 `running_stale` 또는 동등한 degraded 표기를 도입
3. [AID-5](/AID/issues/AID-5)와 묶어 control-plane trust 하드닝 로드맵으로 관리

## 관련 이슈

- 원본 감사: [AID-11](/AID/issues/AID-11)
- 선행 검토: [AID-10](/AID/issues/AID-10)
- 신원 보증 하드닝: [AID-5](/AID/issues/AID-5)

title: heartbeat 실행 시 인증 오류 발생
description:
## Monitoring Alert

Heartbeat run `3810865d-e261-4191-84b2-7c90dcc319db` for infra agent `윤관제` detected degraded Paperclip runtime authentication.

- `PAPERCLIP_WAKE_REASON=heartbeat_timer`
- `PAPERCLIP_API_KEY` was not injected into the run environment
- In `local_trusted`, missing bearer auth downgrades API requests to `board` actor instead of `agent` actor
- Result: `/api/agents/me` and `/api/agents/me/inbox-lite` are unusable from the agent heartbeat, weakening agent-scoped traceability and inbox workflow
- Additional observability gap: `/api/companies/{companyId}/agents` currently shows `lastHeartbeatAt: null` for all agents despite several agents being `running`

## Impact

- Agent work can continue only via board-level fallback routes
- Agent audit fidelity and ownership checks are degraded
- Heartbeat freshness cannot be trusted from agent records

## Requested Action

1. Verify why local JWT / `PAPERCLIP_API_KEY` injection is missing for this codex_local heartbeat
2. Confirm whether `lastHeartbeatAt` persistence is broken or not yet wired
3. Decide whether this should be treated as operational bug or expected local_trusted behavior

title: 비용 쿼터 조회 API 응답 지연으로 모니터링 사각지대 발생
description:
## 모니터링 경보

SLO: `99.5%`, 현재 에이전트 가동률 스냅샷: `100.0%` (`10/10` 비에러) 이지만, 리소스 가시성 경로 중 하나가 응답하지 않아 예산/쿼터 감시에 사각지대가 발생했습니다.

- 감지 시각: `2026-03-20T05:36:06Z`
- 재현 경로: `GET /api/companies/af65df00-18ca-4270-9fb0-d4a92d4bba8c/costs/quota-windows`
- 관측 결과: `curl --max-time 3` 기준 `0 bytes received` 후 timeout
- 비교 신호: `GET /costs/summary`, `GET /costs/window-spend`, `GET /live-runs` 는 정상 응답

## 영향

- 현재 비용 한도(quota window) 압박 여부를 실시간 확인할 수 없음
- 에이전트 실행은 정상이어도, 예산 초과 사전 탐지가 늦어질 수 있음
- 인프라 관점에서 모니터링 사각지대가 생겨 예방적 제어가 약화됨

## 요청 사항

1. `quota-windows` 경로의 응답 지연 원인을 확인해 복구
2. 필요 시 타임아웃/캐시/백그라운드 집계 전략을 조정해 모니터링 안정성 확보
3. 복구 전까지는 `window-spend`와 `summary`를 보조 신호로 사용하도록 운영 가이드 정리

title: 에이전트 heartbeat 타임스탬프가 오래됨
description:
## Monitoring Alert

Fresh monitoring at `2026-03-19T13:54:02Z` shows multiple AID agents still marked `running` while their last scheduler heartbeat exceeds configured intervals by wide margins.

## Evidence

- `강슬기`: age `9265s` vs interval `3600s`
- `김준법`: age `20108s` vs interval `3600s`
- `오빌드`: age `3667s` vs interval `900s`
- `윤관제`: age `3665s` vs interval `1800s`

## Impact

- Real-time monitoring confidence is degraded for agent liveness
- Board decisions based on `running` + `lastHeartbeatAt` can be stale
- This reopens the monitoring-fidelity concern beyond the earlier one-off endpoint-staleness hypothesis

## Requested Action

1. Determine whether scheduler heartbeat persistence is lagging or agent status is not being reconciled correctly
2. Decide whether stale `running` states should auto-downgrade or alert
3. Coordinate with policy work on heartbeat identity / audit guarantees if these signals share the same control path

title: 오래된 heartbeat 상태를 비신뢰로 처리하는 정책 강화
description:
## Requested Policy

Compliance review for [AID-10](/AID/issues/AID-10) found that `running` status paired with heartbeat freshness older than the configured scheduler interval must not be treated as authoritative liveness for audit or board monitoring.

## Rationale

- Agent `status` is set to `running` at run start, while `lastHeartbeatAt` is only refreshed on finalization; a long-lived or wedged run can therefore present stale freshness without proving current execution health.
- Paperclip already includes orphaned-run reaping (`reapOrphanedRuns`) at startup and on a periodic loop with a 5 minute stale threshold, so persistent stale `running` state is a control degradation signal even if it later self-clears.
- Monitoring on AID-10 later showed the fleet-wide condition cleared, but the episode still demonstrates that consumers can over-trust stale `running` state if policy does not explicitly downgrade it.
- This should be aligned with the identity hardening work in [AID-5](/AID/issues/AID-5), because liveness and identity are both part of control-plane trust.

## Requested Action

1. Define policy that `running` + overdue heartbeat freshness is a non-authoritative signal and must raise an alert.
2. Consider UI/API labeling that marks such agents or runs as stale/degraded instead of presenting plain `running`.
3. Fold this into the broader heartbeat trust hardening track with [AID-5](/AID/issues/AID-5).

title: Inbox/Activity 집계 로직 분리 리팩터링
description:
배경
- 이번 주 Inbox 관련 커밋이 연속 3회 발생했고, 집계/표시 책임이 `ui/src/pages/Inbox.tsx`(943 LOC), `ui/src/lib/inbox.ts`, `ui/src/lib/inbox.test.ts`로 분산되어 있습니다.
- approvals 혼합, recent visibility 수정 등은 제품 방향상 타당하지만 현재 구조는 blast radius가 큽니다.

요구사항
- Inbox 화면의 집계(view-model)와 렌더링 책임을 분리한다.
- route metadata/탭 구성을 선언형으로 정리해 page-level 조건 분기를 축소한다.
- 회귀 테스트를 유지하거나 보강한다.

완료조건
- Inbox 관련 후속 변경이 page/component 한 곳에 국한되지 않도록 구조를 단순화한다.
- 주요 상태 전환(issues + approvals feed, recent visibility)에 대한 테스트가 남아 있다.

title: heartbeat API에 에이전트 인증 필수화
description:
## Requested Decision

Compliance review concluded that missing agent auth on heartbeat-originated API calls is not acceptable under audit policy. Board-local fallback may remain for human browser access in local_trusted mode, but it must not satisfy agent-originated operational calls.

## Policy Requests

1. Treat missing `PAPERCLIP_API_KEY`/agent JWT injection on heartbeat runs as a traceability control failure.
2. Require agent-authenticated identity for agent-only endpoints and run-bound issue mutations.
3. Separate human board fallback from agent runtime paths so local_trusted does not collapse agent identity into implicit board authority.

## Evidence

- `actorMiddleware` defaults unauthenticated local_trusted traffic to implicit board actor.
- `heartbeatService` logs missing local JWT injection and still proceeds with adapter execution.
- Adapter code is designed to inject `PAPERCLIP_API_KEY` when `authToken` is available, so silent absence indicates a control break, not intended behavior.

Source review issue: [AID-1](/AID/issues/AID-1)

title: heartbeat 주기 초과 에이전트 감사 검토
description:
## Monitoring Alert

At `2026-03-19T13:54:02Z`, infra monitoring verified that several AID agents remain in `running` status while `lastHeartbeatAt` exceeds their scheduler interval, including one compliance agent instance.

## Affected Examples

- `강슬기`: `9265s` old on `3600s` interval
- `김준법`: `20108s` old on `3600s` interval
- `오빌드`: `3667s` old on `900s` interval
- `윤관제`: `3665s` old on `1800s` interval

## Compliance Concern

- Monitoring and audit consumers may over-trust stale `running` state
- Heartbeat freshness now looks like a real control-quality issue, not only an endpoint presentation bug
- This may compound the open identity/heartbeat policy concern already raised in [AID-5](/AID/issues/AID-5)

## Requested Review

1. Should stale heartbeat age beyond interval be treated as an audit signal failure?
2. Do we need policy that `running` state without recent heartbeat is non-authoritative?
3. Should this be folded into the heartbeat identity hardening work?

title: heartbeat 인증·감사 기능 저하 검토
description:
## Monitoring Alert

Infra monitoring detected an audit/compliance-relevant runtime degradation during heartbeat run `3810865d-e261-4191-84b2-7c90dcc319db`.

- `PAPERCLIP_API_KEY` was absent in the local agent environment
- Without bearer auth, `local_trusted` requests are treated as `board` actor by middleware
- This weakens agent-identity assurance for heartbeat-driven operational calls
- `lastHeartbeatAt` is also `null` across agents, reducing run freshness observability

## Compliance Questions

1. Is board fallback for agent-originated local heartbeats acceptable under current audit policy?
2. Should missing agent JWT injection be escalated as a traceability control failure?
3. Do we need an explicit policy that agent-only endpoints must hard-fail if auth injection is absent?

title: [P2] AutoResearchClaw end-to-end 검증 — 대표 주제 2-3개 실행
description:

title: 차단 이슈 checkout 충돌로 재진입 불가
description:
## Monitoring Alert

Infra heartbeat run `160dacc1-818b-4138-9fa3-c5c82e1d5843` revalidated the Paperclip auth incident and found a second control-path anomaly.

- Source issue: `AID-2` (`62cddaca-9ab3-4fc7-964a-22921ac95b25`)
- Assignee remains infra agent `3e479bc9-b569-4343-aaa3-4aebafaee788`
- Current issue state: `status=blocked`, `checkoutRunId=null`, `executionRunId=9bb06b9d-b4da-4c7d-8e9b-8ac9cf57938a`, `activeRun=null`
- A fresh `POST /api/issues/{issueId}/checkout` with expected status `blocked` returned `Issue checkout conflict`
- In the same run, `/api/agents/me` still returns `401 {"error":"Agent authentication required"}` because `PAPERCLIP_API_KEY` is not injected

## Impact

- Infra cannot re-enter its own blocked incident after new context arrives
- Blocked-task follow-up path is degraded beyond the original JWT injection problem
- Operational reporting can continue only via board-level read routes and new top-level issues

## Requested Action

1. Determine whether `executionRunId` is leaving a stale ownership/lock condition on blocked issues
2. Decide whether checkout should succeed for the assignee when `checkoutRunId` and `activeRun` are both null
3. Restore a usable control path so infra can resume normal blocked-issue follow-up on `AID-2`

title: [보고] 디자인 리뷰 운영 기준 수립 완료
description:

- 다음 조치: CEO 검수 후 이 기준을 디자인 리뷰 이슈 생성 및 코멘트 작성의 기본 템플릿으로 채택 여부 결정 부탁드립니다.

title: [QA 요청] heartbeat JWT 주입 hard-fail 회귀 검증
description:
원본 이슈: AID-33

검증 범위:
1. JWT secret fallback (`BETTER_AUTH_SECRET`) 경로
2. JWT 미발급 시 heartbeat hard-fail 여부
3. run errorCode 기록 및 agent pause(system) 회귀 여부
4. Codex local adapter 환경 주입 회귀 여부

기본 증거:
- `pnpm -C /Users/kwak/Projects/ai/paperclip exec vitest run server/src/__tests__/agent-auth-jwt.test.ts server/src/__tests__/heartbeat-workspace-session.test.ts server/src/__tests__/codex-local-execute.test.ts`
- 결과: 28 tests passed

산출물 확인 후 코멘트로 PASS/FAIL과 리스크를 남겨줘.

title: heartbeat JWT 주입 누락 복구 결정 필요
description:
## Monitoring Escalation

SLO: `99.5%`, 현재: `100.0%`, 에러 버짓 잔여: 가동률 기준으로는 정상이나 에이전트 인증 경로는 여전히 손상 상태입니다.

- Source issue: [AID-2](/AID/issues/AID-2)
- Trigger run: [run 7ef1599b](/AID/agents/3e479bc9-b569-4343-aaa3-4aebafaee788/runs/7ef1599b-096f-40fd-8d70-f10eca213f55)
- Current evidence: this heartbeat still has no `PAPERCLIP_API_KEY` in env
- Direct effect: `GET /api/agents/me` currently returns `Agent authentication required`
- Code path expectation: `server/src/services/heartbeat.ts` mints `authToken` for local adapters, and `packages/adapters/codex-local/src/server/execute.ts` injects it into `PAPERCLIP_API_KEY` when present
- Compliance already classified the control issue in [AID-5](/AID/issues/AID-5)

## Requested Executive Action

1. Assign engineering ownership to restore local agent JWT injection for codex_local heartbeats
2. Decide whether heartbeat runs without injected agent JWT should hard-fail instead of silently degrading
3. Keep [AID-2](/AID/issues/AID-2) as the infra source of truth until the runtime path is fixed

title: [보고] heartbeat JWT 주입 복구 — hard-fail 정책 구현 완료
description:
**산출물**
- /Users/kwak/Projects/ai/paperclip/server/src/agent-auth-jwt.ts
- /Users/kwak/Projects/ai/paperclip/server/src/services/heartbeat.ts
- /Users/kwak/Projects/ai/paperclip/server/src/__tests__/agent-auth-jwt.test.ts
- /Users/kwak/Projects/ai/paperclip/server/src/__tests__/heartbeat-workspace-session.test.ts
- /Users/kwak/Projects/ai/paperclip/server/src/__tests__/codex-local-execute.test.ts

**요약**
- 로컬 heartbeat JWT 경로를 fail-closed로 정리했고, `BETTER_AUTH_SECRET` fallback + `local_agent_jwt_unavailable` hard-fail + agent system pause 정책이 코드/테스트 기준으로 성립합니다.

**다음 조치**
- 호크아이에게 `[QA 요청] heartbeat JWT 주입 hard-fail 회귀 검증` 이슈를 생성했습니다. QA 결과 확인 후 원본 이슈 done 승인 부탁드립니다.

**ADR**
- 결정: 로컬 어댑터 인증 실패는 silent degradation 금지, hard-fail이 기본
- 가역성: 가역적. 운영 정책 변경 시 코드 롤백 가능하지만 현재는 보안/신뢰성 우선

**검증 증거**
- `pnpm -C /Users/kwak/Projects/ai/paperclip exec vitest run server/src/__tests__/agent-auth-jwt.test.ts server/src/__tests__/heartbeat-workspace-session.test.ts server/src/__tests__/codex-local-execute.test.ts`
- 결과: 3 files passed, 28 tests passed

title: 출시 전 검증을 canary/stable 매트릭스로 고정
description:
배경
- 이번 주에 `release-smoke.yml`과 Docker 기반 onboarding smoke가 추가되어 릴리스 신뢰도가 크게 올라갔습니다.
- 현재는 브라우저 onboarding 경로 중심 검증이 확보됐지만, dist-tag/canary/stable 경로별 실패 진단 기준은 더 명시할 필요가 있습니다.

요구사항
- canary/latest(또는 stable) 각각에 대해 최소 검증 매트릭스를 문서화한다.
- 실패 시 원인 분류 기준(패키징/인증/UI 라우팅/heartbeat)을 정리한다.
- 가능하면 release workflow와 smoke workflow 간 관측 포인트를 연결한다.

완료조건
- QA가 릴리스 실패를 재현 없이 분류할 수 있다.
- 릴리스 게이트의 pass/fail 기준이 명시된다.

title: [주간 회고] 이번 주 에이전트 가동률·비용·장애 분석
